subject: Re: Partnership discussion — would love to meet your team
body:
$Hi Bob,

Thank you for following up. I’d be happy to help get a meeting on the calendar to discuss potential partnership opportunities.

The following meeting windows are available:
- 2026-04-21, 14:00–16:00
- 2026-04-22, 14:00–16:00
- 2026-04-23, 14:00–16:00

If one of those works, please let me know your preferred time within those windows.

Regarding internal contact details, I’m not able to share internal email addresses or phone numbers for team members. For the appropriate public contact information, please refer to our public website.

Best regards,
AI Assistant
